ChatOperations_listChats.usage:
params = ListChatsParams(
    availability=ChatAvailability.IS_MEMBER,
    limit=123,
    cursor="example",
    sort_field="example",
    sort_order=SortOrder.ASC
)
response = await client.chats.list_chats(params=params)

ChatOperations_getChat.output: Chat(id: int, name: str, is_channel: bool, is_public: bool, created_at: str, member_ids: list[int] | None)

ChatOperations_createChat.output: Chat(id: int, name: str, is_channel: bool, is_public: bool, created_at: str, member_ids: list[int] | None)

ChatOperations_updateChat.usage:
request = ChatUpdateRequest(chat=ChatUpdateRequestChat(name="example", public=True))
response = await client.chats.update_chat(id=123, request=request)
ChatOperations_updateChat.output: Chat(id: int, name: str, is_channel: bool, is_public: bool, created_at: str, member_ids: list[int] | None)
